entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History
entries.value: AI Àkókò Travel fún ẹ̀kọ́ ìtàn

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: AI Time Travel For Learning History jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ láìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Gba ti àkókò ìwé ìrìn-àjò, mọ́ ìkìlọ̀ ìrìn-àjò, lẹ́yìn náà ṣàwárí pato àwùjọ ìtàn nípasẹ̀ ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀, máàpù, ìlà àkókò, ènìyàn, àwọn òfin, àkójọ ohun èlò, àti ẹ̀rí.

entries.value: AI Àkókò Travel fún ẹ̀kọ́ ìtàn: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays And Drafts: practical guide
entries.value: AI Kíkọ olùkọ́ fún Essays àti Drafts: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts
entries.value: AI Kíkọ olùkọ́ fún Essays, àwọn ìtàn-àròsọ, àti tó mọ́ síi Drafts

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI Kíkọ olùkọ́ fún Essays, àwọn ìtàn-àròsọ, àti tó mọ́ síi Drafts jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Improve àwọn àròkọ, àwọn ìtàn-àròsọ, emails, àti àwọn àríyànjiyàn pẹ̀lú tó dojú kọ ìdáhùn yẹn ń pa tirẹ voice intact.
Ìdáhùn AI lórí kíkọ fún akẹ́kọ̀ọ́
AI ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ àwọn ìbéèrè

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ yẹn ń pa tirẹ voice intact.

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: Gbogbo inspir ìbéèrè ẹ̀kọ́ AI starters

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: Gbogbo gbangba AI ẹ̀kọ́ chats nínú ọ̀kan tó mọ́ ibi.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: AI ẹ̀kọ́ alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí kì í ṣe ṣe bí ẹni pé láti jẹ́ àmúlùùmọ́ aláṣẹ. ó yẹ kí kì í ṣe pa rẹ́ àìdánilójú, rọ́pò àwọn olùkọ́, tàbí kọ́ àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ láti daakọ àwọn ìdáhùn. tó dára jù àwọn eto jẹ́ olóòtítọ́ nípa àwọn ààlà àti mọ́ nípa ìyàtọ̀ láàárín ìrànlọ́wọ́ àti gbígbé fún ẹlòmíràn.

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: Electronic tàbí physical signature ti ènìyàn fún láṣẹ láti act lórí behalf ti owner ti copyright’s interest; description ti copyrighted iṣẹ́ yẹn ìwọ ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́ ní ti jẹ́ infringed, including URL (mo.e., web ojú-ìwé adirẹsi) ti location ibo copyrighted iṣẹ́ exists tàbí daakọ ti copyrighted iṣẹ́; Identification ti URL tàbí míì pato location lórí iṣẹ́ ibo ohun èlò yẹn ìwọ ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́ jẹ́ infringing jẹ́ located; tirẹ adirẹsi, tẹlifóònù number, àti email adirẹsi; gbólóhùn nípasẹ̀ ìwọ yẹn ìwọ ní ìgbàgbọ́ tó dá lórí òtítọ́ yẹn disputed lo jẹ́ kì í ṣe fún láṣẹ nípasẹ̀ olùní copyright, tirẹ̀ agent, tàbí law; gbólóhùn nípasẹ̀ ìwọ, ṣe lábẹ́ ìjìyà ti ẹ̀rí irọ́, yẹn above ìwífún nínú tirẹ ìkìlọ̀ jẹ́ péye àti yẹn ìwọ jẹ́ olùní copyright tàbí fún láṣẹ láti act lórí olùní copyright’s behalf.

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
Analyze a chart from my textbook
entries.value: Ṣe àtúpalẹ̀ àtẹ́wé kan láti inú ìwé-ẹ̀kọ́ mi

entries.source: Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Dá ìbéèrè ìṣàyẹ̀wò lóhùn, gbìmọ̀ ìgbésẹ̀ kan wò, jiyàn lórí ẹ̀sùn kan, tún draft ṣe, tàbí kọ́ kaadi ìrántí.

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Dáhùn ìbéèrè tó wà lọ́wọ́ báyìí ní èdè tirẹ̀

entries.source: Answer the learner directly, then offer two possible paths: simpler foundations or deeper exploration.
entries.value: Ìdáhùn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ directly, lẹ́yìn náà pèsè méjì possible àwọn ọ̀nà: rọrùn síi foundations tàbí jinlẹ̀ síi ìṣàwárí.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: Eyikeyii contests, sweepstakes tàbí míì promotions (papọ̀, “Promotions”) ṣe wà nípasẹ̀ iṣẹ́ lè jẹ́ darí nípasẹ̀ àwọn òfin yẹn jẹ́ separate láti wọ̀nyí Àwọn Òfin iṣẹ́. bí ìwọ kópa nínú eyikeyii Promotions, jọ̀wọ́ àtúnyẹ̀wò applicable àwọn òfin gẹ́gẹ́ bí dáadáa gẹ́gẹ́ bí wa Ìlànà Ìpamọ́. bí àwọn òfin fún Promotion conflict pẹ̀lú wọ̀nyí Àwọn Òfin iṣẹ́, Promotion àwọn òfin máa kan.

entries.source: API, admin, reset, private utility, and private saved-chat surfaces are not public source content.
entries.value: API, admin, reset, ìkọ̀kọ̀ utility, àti ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved-chat surfaces jẹ́ kì í ṣe gbangba àkóónú tàbíísun.

entries.source: Applied AI learning work before the current AI wave.
entries.value: Applied AI ẹ̀kọ́ iṣẹ́ kí lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ AI wave.

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
Apply the idea to a new example.
Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Ṣé Olùgbọ́ àwọn ojú-ìwé gbangba àti tó ṣeé fi sínú níọ́ka?

entries.source: Are private saved user conversations exposed to search?
entries.value: Ṣé Ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved onílo conversations exposed láti wá?
Ṣé Gbangba àwọn ìjíròrò àlejò tó ṣeé fi sínú níọ́ka?
Ṣé Àwọn quiz àti àwọn kaadi ìrántí wà nínú?
Ṣé quizzes dára ju kíka léraléra lọ?
Ṣé Kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ibùdó tó ṣeé fi sínú níọ́ka?

entries.source: Are the articles connected to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Ṣé Àwọn àpilẹ̀kọ sopọ̀ láti àwọn irinṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ AI taara?

entries.source: Are these pages saying inspir replaces every learning platform?
entries.value: Ṣé Wọ̀nyí àwọn ojú-ìwé ń sọ inspir replaces gbogbo pẹpẹ ẹ̀kọ́?

entries.source: Are these pages written only for search engines?
entries.value: Ṣé Wọ̀nyí àwọn ojú-ìwé written nìkan fún àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìwádìí?

entries.source: Are these prompts just for ChatGPT?
entries.value: Ṣé Wọ̀nyí àwọn ìbéèrè kan fún ChatGPT?

entries.source: Are these real public pages or just app screens?
entries.value: Ṣé Wọ̀nyí àwọn ojú-ìwé gbangba gidi tàbí kan àwọn iboju app?

entries.source: Are these workflows free to try?
entries.value: Ṣé Wọ̀nyí àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́ ọ̀fẹ́ láti gbìyànjú?

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Jiyàn ní ẹ̀gbẹ́ méjèèjì kí o sì mú ọpọlọ rẹ pọ́n

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Iṣẹ́ ọnà Appreciation ìtọ́sọ́nà ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI jẹ́ ọ̀nà tó dojú kọ lílo AI fún ẹ̀kọ́ dípò kíkó ìdáhùn jọ lọ́nà aláìṣiṣẹ́. A kọ́ ipo náà yí iṣẹ́ kan pato ká: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, àti kí ń mú image lágbára.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Iṣẹ́ ọnà Appreciation ìtọ́sọ́nà ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI: ìtọ́sọ́nà tó wúlò

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Iṣẹ́ ọnà Appreciation ìtọ́sọ́nà àwọn ìbéèrè àti ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
entries.value: Àwọn àpilẹ̀kọ, ipo àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti ìbéèrè àwọn ìyípo

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Béèrè nípa àwọn àfojúsùn, deadlines, wà àkókò, àti lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ confidence.
Béèrè lọ́wọ́ Ambedkar nípa ìjọba tiwantiwa

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Beere eyikeyi ibeere ki o kọ ẹkọ nipasẹ awọn alaye ti o han gbangba, awọn apẹẹrẹ, awọn itọsi atẹle, ati ikẹkọ AI alaisan.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Béèrè olùgbọ́, metric, risks, àti báwo láti fi kún improvement.
Béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè tó dára jù

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Béèrè kóòdù olùkọ́ fún simplest àwòṣe nínúú, ọ̀kan example, àti ọ̀kan thing beginners often misunderstand.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Béèrè lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ àṣà ojoojúmọ́, target ìṣe àṣà, àti easiest lojoojúmọ́ ẹ̀dà.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Béèrè follow-ups, evaluate accuracy àti confidence, ṣe àtúnṣe àwọn àlàfo, àti retry.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Ìtọ́ni, ní akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ṣàlàyé tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀, lẹ́yìn náà lo quiz tàbí kaadi ìrántí láti ṣàyẹ̀wò bóyá èrò stuck.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
entries.value: Béèrè ìtọ́ni, kì í ṣe ìdáhùn

entries.source: Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ìtọ́ni, ìbéèrè, tàbí ìgbésẹ̀ ṣàyẹ̀wò kí ìdáhùn.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Ìtọ́ni. ṣe kì í ṣe béèrè fún ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn yet.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Ìmọ̀ aṣìṣe ṣàyẹ̀wò, short ìrántí ìbéèrè, tàbí nira síi àpẹẹrẹ. ìdáhùn kí bíbéèrè AI láti ṣe àtúnṣe ìwọ.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Béèrè àlàyé tó rọrùn síi fún èrò tó ṣòro jù fún ọ.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún small àkọ́kọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ dípò ìdáhùn ìkẹyìn.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Kókó, ìpele, tàbí ọ̀rọ̀ list; lẹ́yìn náà introduce small set.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Artwork/style tàbí pèsè looking ìlànà.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Assignment darúkọ, due dates, ìsapá, àti lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ status.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Béèrè fún olùgbọ́, àfojúsùn, àti draft status bí unclear; lẹ́yìn náà fún tó dojú kọ ìdáhùn.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Béèrè fún author, àkọlé, ọjọ́, publisher, URL, àti ìráyè wọlé ọjọ́ nígbà tí needed.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Wà àkókò, must-do àwọn iṣẹ́, àti agbára ìpele.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Béèrè fún commitment, alábàáṣiṣẹ́/àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀, check-in frequency, àti proof.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Domain àti ìṣòro, lẹ́yìn náà set ọ̀ràn brief àti àkọ́kọ́ ìpinnu.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Béèrè fún event àti depth, lẹ́yìn náà separate ìpilẹ̀ causes láti immediate triggers.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Béèrè fún exam ọjọ́, àkójọ ẹ̀kọ́, wà àkókò, àti confidence nípasẹ̀ kókó.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Béèrè ìbéèrè márùn-ún tó da ìtumọ̀, àpẹẹrẹ, àti ìṣòro ìfiránṣẹ́ pọ̀.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Béèrè fún format, ààlà àkókò, àti olùgbọ́; lẹ́yìn náà begin adaṣe round.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Béèrè fún àfojúsùn, àwọn ààlà, àti desired vibe; lẹ́yìn náà pèsè varied èrò set.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Béèrè fún àfojúsùn, timeline, àwọn iṣẹ́, àti kí counts gẹ́gẹ́ bí gidi progress.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Béèrè fún grading ìwọn ńlá, weights, lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ scores, àti target.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Béèrè fún group size, àfojúsùn, duration, àti check-in cadence.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Àwọn ìtọ́ni, àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, àti ìdáhùn kí bíbéèrè fún parí ìdáhùn.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Béèrè ìtọ́ni, ìṣàyẹ̀wò, ìdáhùn, àti ètò ẹ̀kọ́ tó jẹ́ kí ìrònú wà lọ́dọ̀ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Béèrè fún èdè, àfojúsùn, àti kóòdù/error bí relevant.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Language, akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ìpele, àti scenario; lẹ́yìn náà bẹ̀rẹ̀ nínú character.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: Béèrè fún material, àkókò ipari, àti prior confidence.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Béèrè fún One àtúnyẹ̀wò priority, kì í ṣe parí replacement.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ọ̀kan small iṣẹ́ kí asking fún ìdáhùn.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ọ̀kan structural priority dípò ti full rewrite.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Béèrè fún one-idea àwọn kaadi pẹ̀lú àwọn ìtọ́ni àti ẹ̀gẹ̀ tó wọ́pọ̀s.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Béèrè fún outcome, duration, distractions, àti starting state.
Béèrè fún èsì láti ọ̀dọ̀ àwọn ẹlẹgbẹ́

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ibi tàbí theme, lẹ́yìn náà orient pẹ̀lú location, ìwọn ńlá, àti pàtàkì àwọn ẹya.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Prerequisites, rọrùn model, àwọn àpẹẹrẹ, àti wọ́pọ̀ ìmọ̀ aṣìṣe.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Ṣèwádìí àfojúsùn, ìpele, àti wà sources.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Béèrè fún role, olùgbọ́, àti ìpilẹ̀; lẹ́yìn náà run àkọ́kọ́ ìbéèrè.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
entries.value: Béèrè fún orísun material àti pair type.

entries.source: Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Béèrè fún Source ohun èlò tàbí kókó àti target ìṣòro.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Béèrè fún orísun material, kókó, àti target detail bí ó bá ṣòfò.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Béèrè fún ìgbékalẹ̀, ẹ̀rí, àti clarity ìdáhùn nígbà tí keeping ìkẹyìn draft tirẹ.
